title: Atlas Expansion X: Domains 676-705 (Dynamical Systems & Math Physics)

D676.name: Hamiltonian mechanics
D676.reason: H(p,q): real energy = EML-2; action = ∫L dt real

D677.name: KAM theory (invariant tori)
D677.reason: Quasiperiodic orbits: irrational frequencies → EML-3 oscillation

D679.name: Strange attractors (Lorenz, Rössler)
D679.reason: Fractal dimension; non-constructive attractor geometry = EML-∞

D680.name: Ergodic theory (von Neumann, Birkhoff)
D680.reason: Time average = space average: EML-2 (real measure)

D681.name: Mixing and entropy (Kolmogorov-Sinai)
D681.reason: KS entropy h_KS = lim (1/n)H(P^n): EML-1 logarithmic

D682.name: Smale horseshoe / symbolic dynamics
D682.reason: Symbol sequences; shift map = discrete = EML-0

D683.name: Celestial mechanics (n-body problem)
D683.reason: n≥3 non-integrable; no closed form = EML-∞

D687.name: Quantum chaos (Gutzwiller trace formula)
D687.reason: Semiclassical trace: Σ exp(iS/ℏ): complex oscillatory = EML-3

D688.name: Resonances and scattering poles
D688.reason: Poles of S-matrix: complex resonances = EML-3

D689.name: Anosov flows
D689.reason: Uniform hyperbolicity; real cone conditions = EML-2

D692.name: Phase transitions (Landau theory)
D692.reason: Order parameter discontinuity; symmetry breaking = EML-∞

D693.name: Renormalization group (Wilson)
D693.reason: RG flow β(g) = dg/d ln μ: EML-1 logarithmic

D694.name: Conformal invariance (2D critical phenomena)
D694.reason: CFT; Virasoro algebra: complex oscillatory = EML-3

D695.name: Spin glasses (Parisi replica)
D695.reason: Replica symmetry breaking; non-constructive free energy = EML-∞

D696.name: Quantum field theory (canonical quantization)
D696.reason: Mode expansion: a_k exp(ikx): complex oscillatory = EML-3

D698.name: Lattice gauge theory
D698.reason: Link variables U_μ ∈ SU(N): complex = EML-3

D701.name: Superstring amplitudes
D701.reason: Modular forms on Riemann surfaces: EML-3

D705.name: Causal sets (Bombelli-Lee-Meyer-Sorkin)
D705.reason: Partial order on events; discrete = EML-0
